title: NHS pay awards 2025 to 2026: doctors and dentists
body: "The Secretary of State for Health and Social Care has accepted the recommendations of the independent pay review bodies to confirm the pay award for 2025 to 2026 for NHS consultants, speciality doctors, specialists, GPs and dentists.  See NHS pay award 2025 to 2026 details for:   resident doctors Agenda for Change staff   "
